title: Realistic Vanilla
description: Realistic Vanilla is a Texture Pack that changes certain aspects of Minecraft to make them look more meaningful, have congruence with their realistic versions, correct some texture errors, without losing the Vanilla style of the game.
body:
Realistic Vanilla is a Texture Pack that changes certain aspects of Minecraft to make them look more meaningful, have congruence with their realistic versions, correct some texture errors, without losing the Vanilla style of the game.

![Welcome to Realistic Vanilla!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63673d15265fe6222ef323a0e4b0c5360a78b7fb.png)

Video Preview:[https://youtu.be/e24s-H7dLB4](https://youtu.be/e24s-H7dLB4)
